race.comment: EMBRACE THE WIND (14) comes to hand quickly and proven at the trip. Slashing return from last on the bend with a fast finishing eighth over 1100m at this track. Ready for this trip and further and can race much closer from the draw. Hard to stop. KOIOS (9) is starting to put it together this prep and deserves his chance in town deep into the prep. Was a month between runs with a tiring third over 1350m at Wyong. Drops in weight and not without each way prospects. MYRIAD (13) brings some good form to the table and could measure up again. DANISH PRINCE (11) was solid at the trials so is worth keeping safe fresh.
